column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit striking a Sentai transformation pose" | TEXT="了解です！" P2: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit pointing to the sky heroically" | TEXT="承知いたしました" P3: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit posing with legs wide apart" | TEXT="承りました" P4: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit doing a martial arts salute" | TEXT="お任せください" P5: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit with a hand on the hip, laughing" | TEXT="ハハハ！任せろ" P6: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit striking a pose with explosions in back" | TEXT="参上しました！" P7: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit doing a classic "Hen-shin" pose" | TEXT="切り替えていきます" P8: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit pointing forward with a wink" | TEXT="君に決めた！" P9: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit doing a dramatic cape flourish" | TEXT="正義は勝つ！"
